title: Tormenta Cobblemon World
description: A modpack with the best of cobblemon and minecraft.
body:
Simple modpack for me an my friends with our favorite mod Cobblemon.
The idea was to combine everything good that is in Minecraft with the best that is in the world of Cobblemon.
So we have quality of life mods and rpg mods, so you can face the monsters of minecraft with your pokemon helpers.
  Only a few graphical mods were added. Just to make the adventure more beautiful without losing the essence of Minecraft.
  I intend to continue updating the Modpack with all the good additions made by the community within this wonderful universe that is Pokémon.
